title: More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants
description: Chiseled Bookshelves for every kind of wood
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/mod-titles/more-chiselled-bookshelf-variants.png) ## Textures by [Cynthia](https://cynthia.dev/) and pnku [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/requires/quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Chiseled-Bookshelf-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku-top.svg) ## More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants Fill your builds with colorful book storage: Each wood type now has its own chiseled bookshelf! ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/0k1u9.png) ### Adding 11 new _Chiseled Bookshelves_ to Minecraft
How can I craft vanilla Chiseled Bookshelfs using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Chiseled Bookshelf crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft chiseled bookshelfs and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku-bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/x9qxh.gif)**]()
